task RW_022 {
    require cap(relay1)
    require cap(relay2)
    require cap(water_sensor)

    set relay1 = 1
    wait 1000ms
    read relay1
    if (readback relay1) != 1 then halt
    repeat 3 times {
        set relay1 = 1
        wait 1000ms
        read relay1
        if (readback relay1) == 1 then break
    }
    wait 10000ms

    set relay2 = 1
    wait 1000ms
    read relay2
    if (readback relay2) != 1 then halt
    repeat 3 times {
        set relay2 = 1
        wait 1000ms
        read relay2
        if (readback relay2) == 1 then break
    }
    halt
}
